title: Glazed Shulkers
description: Custom shulker textures dependant on their content! Included are some of the most commonly used stuff on DonutSMP. Simple and unobtrusive.
body:
**Ever wanted to quickly buy something in bulk from /ah, but it took forever looking through shulkers? Accidentally dropped an important item into your storage system an it ended up packed up in a shulker and thrown with your farm drops? I present a solution: Glazed Shulkers!**



Custom shulker textures based on their content! Intended for DonutSMP, but will work in any server or world. For fair play reasons the texture change occurs only in gui.  Works in vanilla minecraft, no optifine needed. 

### List of added textures:
- Sea pickles (need full shulker)
- Kelp (need full shulker)
- Bamboo (need full shulker)
- Wood (any type, need full shulker)
- Empty
- Crimson root and/or crimson fungus and/or warped fungus (mustn't contain other items)
- Protection 4, unbreaking 3, mending diamond/netherite armor with blast protection on leggings (marked R) / leggings + boots (marked R bp). note: set can also have more enchantments like respiration, swift sneak etc.
- Glazed shulkers :)


**important note: if shulkers show no texture (black and purple checkers) just reload resoucepacks (f3 + t). I'm looking into fixing the issue.**

This is still very much in development and I plan to add more features. Any suggestions are welcome, find me on discord @finnorra.
